metadata.title:
WOMAN
SUES THE


MAYOR
elizabeth GURLEY FLYNN AL
LEGEs LIBEL AGAINST


PRATT.
OFFENDING SUBJECT WAS LET.
TER WRITTEN BY THE


MAYOR.

pages.raw_text:
Alleging that he has sent let
ter containing false, malicious and
libelous matter, and thereby dam
aged and greatly injured her repu-
tation as public speaker and lee
turer, Elizabeth GurIey Flynn has
filed complaint against Mayor
N. S. Pratt, asking for $4,000 In
damages. The complaint was filed
in the superior court today.


The woman l. w. w. and social.
list leader has also filed a com
plant against the Spokesman-Re-
view Publishing company and its
editor, N. w. Durham. for printing
the letter, alleging criminal libel.


The letter in question. according
to the complaint against Mayor
Pratt, was sent by him to Leonard
